name: Reachable State
description: Definition of reachability of a state from another state in a discrete system.

elements.text: The state y ∈ SZ is reachable from x ∈ SZ iff there exists f ∈ ITZ and t ∈ TZ such that y = STZ(f, x)(t).
y is reachable from x by means of the input trajectory f at time t.
